import zipfile

filepath = r"C:\\Users\\manyw\\Sciebo\\Buttcoin\\ClaudeButtcoin\\Lore\\Buttcoin Lore.docx"
print\(f"FILE: Buttcoin Lore.docx"\)
print\('='*80\)
try:
    z = zipfile.ZipFile\(filepath\)
    content = z.read\('word/document.xml'\).decode\('utf-8'\)
    # Remove XML tags for readability
    import re
    text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', content\)
    text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\).strip\(\)
    print\(text\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"ERROR: {e}"\)
EOF)
